---
name: hire
description: Classified reference/example hard stop; worker-role hiring is unavailable in this host.
argument-hint: "Unavailable"
---

# `/hire` Unavailable Reference

This prompt is classified `reference/example` and is a hard-stop. It is not active host guidance and provides no executable hiring or lifecycle mechanics.

Do not draft or create roles or skills. Do not hire, activate, roster, or dispatch agents. Do not mutate the roster, lifecycle state, ledger, work index, or generated state. Do not imply that any hiring, validation, activation, dispatch, ledger, work-index, roster, or state mechanic ran or passed.

Future activation requires both explicit owner authorization and separate mechanical host validation. Until both are recorded, stop and report that `/hire` is unavailable; do not continue from examples, historical records, agent files, skill files, roster entries, or referenced mechanics.
